rounds.pro_tip: ATMOSPHERIC DETAILS:** Observe if dappled light and shadows fall realistically on multiple subjects. Look for natural dust motes, not too prominent or repetitive.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of four friends sitting on a shaded concrete patio outside a cafe, each engrossed in their own smartphone, with empty coffee cups on the table. Captured using a Fujifilm X-T4, 23mm f/2 lens, under bright but dappled daylight filtering through an awning, showcasing the distinct fabric textures of their various shirts and subtle dust motes in the air.

rounds.attribution: Photo by Austin Distel on Unsplash
rounds.pro_tip: CONSISTENT LIGHTING:** Assess how light interacts across the person, laptop, and smartphone. Real photos typically have seamless, natural light flow.

rounds.attribution: Photo by Brian Ramirez on Pexels
rounds.pro_tip: AUTHENTIC UI:** Verify the app interface on screens. Real photos often show genuine, sometimes imperfect, UI elements and user content.
TEXT & UI REALISM:** Inspect on-screen text for gibberish or uncanny perfection. Look for subtle, realistic fingerprint smudges on screens, not too perfect.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a close-up of a hand holding a black smartphone, its screen displaying a vibrant TikTok 'For You' page with a short video paused. Captured with a Sony a7 III, 85mm f/1.4 lens, under soft ambient indoor light from a nearby window, highlighting faint fingerprint smudges on the screen and fine lines on the skin of the thumb.

rounds.pro_tip: NATURAL GRIP & WEAR:** Look for the natural, unforced way hands grip devices. Notice subtle signs of wear on phones or natural skin imperfections.
FINE TEXTURES & GLOWS:** Analyze the realism of intricate textures like knitwear or subtle steam from a mug. Check for a natural, soft glow on skin, avoiding artificial smoothness.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of someone relaxing on a plush armchair, cozily wrapped in a knitted throw, holding a steaming mug and scrolling through social media on a smartphone. Shot with a Sony a7C, 50mm f/1.8 lens, in a dimly lit room with warm light emanating from a floor lamp, highlighting the fuzzy texture of the throw blanket and the soft glow on the person's fingertips.

rounds.pro_tip: REFLECTIONS & TEXTURES:** Examine screen reflections for logical consistency with the environment. Check keyboard keys and wood grain for overly uniform or unnatural detail.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a person's hands resting on a desk, one holding a silver smartphone showing a video call, while a sleek laptop sits open beside it displaying a document. Shot with a Canon EOS R6, 35mm f/1.8 lens, under bright office overhead lighting, revealing the subtle texture of the keyboard keys and the grain of the wooden desk surface.

rounds.attribution: Photo by RDNE Stock project on Pexels
rounds.pro_tip: LIVED-IN ENVIRONMENT:** Spot authentic, slightly unkempt details in a cozy setting, like wrinkles in a throw or natural tabletop items.

rounds.attribution: Photo by Robert So on Pexels
rounds.pro_tip: VARYING REALITY:** Observe the distinct details of multiple subjects. Real photos capture individual differences in clothing textures and natural, non-uniform lighting.
COMPLEX INTERACTIONS:** Evaluate the naturalness of hands simultaneously operating multiple devices. Assess consistency of light reflections across all screens and the intricate fabric weave.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a young woman casually seated on a patterned sofa, glancing up from her laptop screen to quickly type a message on her smartphone held in the other hand. Taken with a Nikon Z7, 50mm f/1.8 lens, illuminated by warm late afternoon natural light flooding a living room, emphasizing the intricate fabric weave of the sofa and the subtle reflections on both screens.

category_subtitle: Scroll, snap, share: Can AI tell the real from reel?
